title: Meridian Academy online-course explainer edit: assemble a talking-head lecture + slide / spreadsheet screencasts into a clean 16:9 lesson master, a 9:16 promo cut, a graded course thumbnail, and intro / lower-third / caption graphic plates
one_line_ask: Turn Meridian Academy's raw Lesson 4 material — a talking-head lecture clip plus slide-deck and spreadsheet screencasts, a logo, a brand look-reference, a cut-list brief, and a captions sheet — into a clean 16:9 lesson master (filler trimmed, cut between presenter and slides via a real video_render timeline), a 9:16 promo highlight, a graded 1280x720 course thumbnail (grabbed from the master), and on-brand intro title-card / lower-third / key-point-caption graphic plates plus a vector logo, all packaged onto a Firefly board and into a dated CC handoff folder for the final NLE polish.

assets.name: meridian_logo.png
assets.fix_note: QC: prior file was RGB with a painted grey/white checkerboard baked into the pixels (no real alpha). Regenerated on a solid flat white background (no checkerboard), then keyed white->true alpha and trimmed to content bounds. Now a real RGBA PNG (alpha extrema 0..255, corners fully transparent). Wordmark 'Meridian Academy' correct, deep-indigo #23255A glyphs + warm-gold #F2B441 rising-line-in-compass mark.

issues: Canvas is square (~1024x1024) rather than the specified ~2400x700 landscape ratio
Compass tick marks are minimal/simplified but acceptable for a source asset
Slight optical weight imbalance between icon and wordmark spacing
Spiral binding on open notebook creates minor visual ambiguity — could read as two separate notebooks rather than one open book, but acceptable for a grade reference
Pen resting in spine crease is slightly unconventional styling but not a defect
Pencil holder jar and wooden cup holder introduce mild prop clutter in background, though within acceptable composition range for a cozy-desk mood board
Indigo accent is present but subtle — the notebook cover beneath the open spiral pad reads as navy/indigo, which satisfies the brief minimally but could be more prominent

assets.name: lecture_talkinghead_raw.mp4

issues: Tablet/laptop on desk shows dark screen — minor missed opportunity for note-reference prop, but acceptable for a candid frame
Bookshelf background slightly soft but within expected handheld depth-of-field

assets.note: Representative ~5s Seedance clip; the brief's raw clip is ~75s. Raw source footage the task reframes/edits, so length is not load-bearing. Video is silent (Seedance); the lecture's noisy native audio is provided as the sidecar lecture_audio_raw.wav.

assets.name: slidedeck_screencast.mp4

qc.note: Regenerated via Seedance 2.0 t2v with a flat full-frame anti-brand prompt. Agent-inspected frames 15/60: clean full-frame screen capture of the branded title slide, cream #F7F4EC bg, deep-indigo header band + warm-gold accent rule, title reads exactly "How Compound Interest Works" (correct spelling, no garble), subtle mouse cursor, NO laptop/desk/camera, NO OS taskbar/browser, NO real brands. On-brand indigo/cream/gold palette.

assets.note: Representative ~5s Seedance-1.0-Pro clip; the brief's raw clip is ~55s. It is raw source footage the task reframes/edits, so length is not load-bearing. Silent (task audio comes from the separate VO track).

assets.name: spreadsheet_screencast.mp4

qc.note: Regenerated via i2v from a fresh letter-perfect gemini-3-pro-image anchor still (spreadsheet chrome with column letters A-D + row numbers; header row Year / Starting Balance / Interest Earned / Ending Balance; exactly 8 data rows with correct 8pct compounding 1000->1851; chart "Compound Interest Growth" with correctly-spelled Balance and Year axes and an upward growth line) then Seedance 1.0 Pro i2v with a LOCKED, no-zoom motion prompt (only the cursor drifts and a cell/range selection outline animates). Agent-inspected frames 10/60/115: all header text and all eight rows of numbers correct, chart correct, and the vertical Balance axis label stays correctly spelled across the ENTIRE clip. This fixes the prior i2v build in which a slow zoom drifted the rotated Y-axis label to read "Balanoe" in the final ~1s. Flat full-frame light-mode capture, no laptop, no OS-chrome, no real brands.

assets.note: Representative ~5s clip; the brief's raw screencast is ~40s. Raw source b-roll the task reframes/edits, so length is not load-bearing. Silent (Seedance).

coverage.audio_sidecar: lecture_audio_raw.wav — native/noisy audio track for lecture_talkinghead_raw.mp4 (Seedance video is silent); source for media_enhance_speech / media_summarize / the cleaned lecture-audio stem.
